title: Test: Cross-mesh communication via Yggdrasil
description: After identity-preserving transport and inter-mesh routing exist, validate two meshes using per-node native 0200::/8 /128s across unmodified Yggdrasil. Cover ping, CoAP, DTN delivery, gateway failover without address change, source-address validation, private-key non-export, and rejection of gateway spoofing.
